nasb.text: Those who had seen it described to them how it had happened to the demon-possessed man, and all about the swine.

esv.text: And those who had seen it described to them what had happened to the demon-possessed man and to the pigs.

cnv.text: 看見的人把被鬼附過的人所遭遇的和那群豬的事，告訴了他們。

ccb.text: 目睹这件事的人向他们讲述整个经过。

csbs.text: 那些看见的人，把发生在有鬼魔附身的人身上和有关猪群的事，都告诉了大家。
